claim: Smaller models achieve high quality on focused tasks with clear instructions + structured outputs; reduces latency/cost vs. flagship
actionable: For latency/cost-critical tasks, test smaller models first with structured outputs; often outperform expected baselines

claim: Chain-of-thought prompting improves small model accuracy on logic/math; reasoning overhead is minimal vs. accuracy gain
actionable: Use chain-of-thought prompts with smaller models; instruction overhead is worthwhile for accuracy boost
